name: wnt11_wnt11r_chr19_chr16
description: Zebrafish TGD ohnolog pair: wnt11/wnt11r — silberblick locus, gastrulation. These developmental regulators are retained in pairs after the teleost-specific whole-genome duplication because their dosage and tissue-specific expression are under strong selection (Force-Lynch DDC model, Lynch-Conery escape from adaptive conflict). CDS identity 80-92%, UTR identity often <50%.
